note: Do not modify. Any change requires a version bump and Track A sign-off.
padding: zero-pad right OR crop right to exactly 16000 samples
channels: mono — stereo input: mean across channels
note_center_false: center=False is CRITICAL — gives T=97 not T=98. (16000-512)/160+1 = 97

logits.name: logits
logits.description: Raw classifier logits. Apply softmax externally for probabilities.
logits.note_qonnx: In the .qonnx graph, output[0] may have an auto-generated integer name. Access by index 0.

embedding.name: embedding
embedding.description: Linear projection of 128-dim GAP feature vector. For Track C ANN fingerprint index.
embedding.note: Embed head is Xavier-uniform initialised, NOT fine-tuned. For structural use only until QAT fine-tuning is complete.
embedding.note_qonnx: In the .qonnx graph, output[1] may have an auto-generated integer name. Access by index 1.

novelty_score.name: novelty_score
novelty_score.description: 1 - max(softmax(logits)). Open-set novelty score. Bounded [0, 1]. Higher = more out-of-distribution.
novelty_score.critical: MUST remain 2-D [1,1]. Never squeeze to scalar [1] or [].
novelty_score.note_qonnx: In the .qonnx graph, output[2] may have an auto-generated integer name. Access by index 2.
